title: parashorea lucida
intro: Parashorea lucida, also known as the 'luminous parashorea', is a species of tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which contains flavonoids and triterpenoids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Parashorea lucida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark of this plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
